ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the series was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the series was last modified */,
  "series_status" TEXT /* Status of the series */,
  "description_short" TEXT /* Short description for quick reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access decision */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the decision pertains to */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Access status (e.g., Closed, Open, Open with exception) */,
  "decision_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for the access decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the access decision */,
  "decision_by" INTEGER /* User who made the decision */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the decision */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision is due for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_decisions_decision_by FOREIGN KEY ("decision_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the document */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
